params.SpellDescription: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. If this spell's additional cost was paid, this effect doesn't affect combat damage that would be dealt by red creatures.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. If this spell's additional cost was paid, this effect doesn't affect combat damage that would be dealt by red creatures.

params.Description: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {2}{R}.
